title: Breakwave Bi Weekly Tanker Report Sep 19 2023 H8M8N
section_path: Breakwave Bi Weekly Tanker Report Sep 19 2023 H8M8N
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi Weekly Tanker Report Sep 19 2023 H8M8N
summary:
Main
• Period rates and freight futures point to a solid recovery, but spot VLCC rates still struggle - Although sentiment in the tanker market remains upbeat, spot rates have not been able to show some solid momentum to satisfy such a bullish outlook. Recent transactions for period rates hit a new six-month high (1-year period deals) while freight futures for the fourth quarter have also recently recovered and are back to late August levels. Yet, spot rates have not followed, with the spot VLCC benchmark rate at just above $9/ton, the same level last seen in late 2021.
